Event: Mushroom Loot - September 2025
Event Date: 15/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: SL20
Spore Cloud Dagger's Soul

Once in a while, the unit hides from enemies, and cannot be targeted for 4 sec. The next 3 attacks it inflicts will additionally deal 250000 pure damage. Also, the soul owner tear through attack target's armor. The unit whose armor is torn receives 200000 pure damage, and their physical armor is reduced by 30% for 4 sec. This unit also receives 350000 physical damage for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
